ef3fd9b1d2.translation: Then she went, accompanied by a hotel page and her guardian, to the elevator.

ef799fa8c2.translation: Our boss wears only plain shirts.

ef7d254dc2.translation: Behind a poster pillar, a black Audi was parked, whose passenger was observing the two through binoculars.

ef8047eae2.translation: The illness weakens the entire organism.

ef85f38257.translation: Two Moldovans, two Transnistrians, and three Russians live together here in a barrack, soldiers of three armies.

ef86298c6b.translation: The die is cast before the game of life has even begun.

ef87ea4d89.text: „Selbst in der CDU/CSU-Fraktion heißt es: "Diese Gelder stinken zum Himmel. Von den vielen dunklen Geldern, die durch die Bonner Republik flossen, profitierte auch Agnes Hürland-Büning, fast 20 Jahre Mitglied im Deutschen Bundestag, Kohl-Vertraute, zuletzt Parlamentarische Staatssekretärin im Verteidigungsministerium. Acht Millionen Mark waren dem Thyssen-Konzern die Beratungsdienste der Politikerin wert, nachdem sie Anfang der neunziger Jahre die Hardthöhe verlassen hatte.“
ef87ea4d89.translation: Even within the CDU/CSU parliamentary group, it is said: "These funds are corrupt to the core. Among the many dark funds that flowed through the Bonn Republic, Agnes Hürland-Büning, who was a member of the German Bundestag for nearly 20 years, Kohl's confidante, and most recently parliamentary state secretary in the Ministry of Defence, also benefited. Eight million marks were worth the politician's consulting services to the Thyssen Group after she left the Hardthöhe in the early nineties."

ef8a26a5a2.translation: The Euro Hawk [...] was intended to help the Bundeswehr to spy out data of an opponent, such as communication links, from 20,000 meters altitude, as well as to recognize enemy radars.

ef8a2ee3f1.translation: The sudden onset of the ice surprised all skaters.

ef8a7f8224.translation: Some of Carmen's friends had posted all the toilets from the Donauinselfest on Facebook about their exes.

ef8adf8942.text: „Grinsend kommt Dad schließlich mit der Wucht eines Hurrikans ins Zimmer geschneit und füllt den ganzen Raum mühelos mit dem Volumen seiner Stimme und seiner einnehmenden Persönlichkeit.“
ef8adf8942.translation: "Grinning, Dad finally bursts into the room with the force of a hurricane and effortlessly fills the entire space with the volume of his voice and his engaging personality."

ef8ca0fb49.translation: She thinks she should have taken Jochen, Wolfgang's tall friend, who was charming her, making advances, and inviting her to dinner.

efa04abaa1.translation: Who is found to be the most harmful to people should, according to our old custom, also be the most prominent rooster in the basket.

efc75cc6c9.text: „Die Einleitungswissenschaft ist demgemäß eine streng historische Disziplin, die durch die Aufhellung der geschichtlichen Umstände bei der Entstehung der einzelnen Schriften der Auslegung die nötigen Voraussetzungen für das Verständnis der Schriften in ihrer geschichtlichen Eigenart liefert und durch die Erforschung des Werdens und der Erhaltung der Sammlung der Frage nach dem Lehrgehalt des Neuen Testaments den sicheren geschichtlichen Boden verschafft.“
efc75cc6c9.translation: The science of introduction is therefore a strictly historical discipline that, by clarifying the historical circumstances surrounding the origin of individual writings, provides the necessary conditions for understanding the writings in their historical particularity, and through the exploration of the becoming and preservation of the collection, offers a secure historical basis for the question of the teaching content of the New Testament.
